description: Tileable 2-D simplex FBM with analytical gradient derivatives. Based on psrdnoise2 (Gustavson & McEwan, JCGT 2022). Output: R=noise [0,1], G=dN/dx, B=dN/dy. Connect G+B to domain-warp or normal-map nodes for artifact-free effects.

outputs.name: color
outputs.description: R=noise [0,1], G=∂n/∂x [0,1 remapped], B=∂n/∂y [0,1 remapped], A=1

params.name: period
params.description: Tile size in simplex lattice cells. MUST be a positive EVEN integer (snapped automatically). The simplex lattice has a 2-row Y stagger; odd periods double the actual Y repeat.

params.name: lacunarity
params.description: Frequency multiplier per octave. Use integer values (2.0 standard) for exact tiling at every octave.

params.name: rotation
params.description: Rotates gradient directions (flow noise effect). 0=no rotation, 6.283=full circle.

params.name: seed
params.description: Per-node noise seed. Change to get a fully decorrelated pattern.
